vibe: Warm, trustworthy, book-loving, local Indian aesthetic, letterpress/paper inspired

headings.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight leading-none text-[#2D2824]

header.style: bg-[#FDFBF7] sticky top-0 z-50 border-b border-[#E8E1D5]
header.logo: font-serif text-3xl font-bold tracking-tight text-[#A64B2A] uppercase

hero.layout: grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-0 border-b border-[#E8E1D5]
hero.text_side: p-8 md:p-16 lg:p-24 flex flex-col justify-center border-b lg:border-b-0 lg:border-r border-[#E8E1D5] bg-[#FDFBF7]
hero.badge: uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-xs font-bold text-[#A64B2A] mb-4 block

product_card.style: group relative flex flex-col bg-white border border-[#E8E1D5] hover:border-[#A64B2A] transition-colors rounded-none
product_card.image_container: relative aspect-[4/5] overflow-hidden border-b border-[#E8E1D5] bg-[#F3EFE7]
product_card.title: font-serif text-lg font-bold line-clamp-2 mb-2 text-[#2D2824]
product_card.add_button: mt-4 w-full border border-[#2D2824] bg-transparent text-[#2D2824] hover:bg-[#2D2824] hover:text-white py-2 px-4 transition-colors uppercase tracking-wider text-xs font-bold

cart_drawer.checkout_btn: w-full bg-[#A64B2A] text-white py-4 font-bold tracking-wider uppercase hover:bg-[#8A3D21] transition-colors

whatsapp_button.style: fixed bottom-6 right-6 bg-[#25D366] text-white p-4 rounded-full shadow-lg hover:-translate-y-1 transition-transform z-50 flex items-center gap-2

images.description: Cozy bookstore interior, side view of concentrated male reading near bookshelves
images.usage: Main hero image on landing page

images.description: Warm and inviting library corner with plush seating
images.usage: About section or secondary hero image
Notebooks/Pens category image or product placeholder

images.description: white spiral notebook beside orange pen
Flat lay of stationery including notebooks, pens, scissors, and stamps
images.usage: Art Supplies / School Supplies category image

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text has at least 4.5:1 contrast ratio against backgrounds.
accessibility.test_ids: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute (e.g. data-testid="add-to-cart-button")

instructions_to_main_agent: You have .js files not .tsx file, so share the guideline for .js files not for .tsx files.
Install fonts 'Cormorant Garamond' and 'Work Sans' from Google Fonts and configure them in tailwind.config.js.
Do NOT use Shadcn Card components for the product grids. Build them with pure HTML/Tailwind as specified (sharp borders, no rounded corners, editorial grid layout) to maintain the print aesthetic.
For the dashboard, you can use Shadcn components (table, dialog, etc.), but MUST override border radii to `rounded-none` and border colors to `#E8E1D5` to match the brand.
Implement a prominent floating WhatsApp button for direct order inquiries.
Ensure all buttons have hover states that change text and background colors clearly, maintaining contrast.
Do not use generic placeholder images like via.placeholder.com. Use the provided Unsplash/Pexels URLs for categories and products.
